mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.guide_id = #{guideId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment WHERE guide_id = #{guideId} AND parent_id IS NULL

SELECT c.*, u.nickname, u.avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_nickname FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_user ru ON c.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_comment (guide_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_user_id, content) VALUES (#{guideId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyUserId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_comment SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
